name: roco-spring-website
description: RoCo-Spring challenge website and registration deployment tooling

scripts.test: npm run test:site && npm --prefix functions test && npm run test:rules && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:rules: node scripts/firebase-safe.mjs emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-roco-spring-rules "node --test test/emulator/firestore-rules.test.mjs"
scripts.security:audit: npm run security:audit:root && npm run security:audit:functions
scripts.deploy:production: npm run release:fetch && npm run release:source:prepush && npm test && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run security:scan && npm run security:audit && npm run release:fetch && npm run release:source:prepush && npm run secrets:verify && npm run google:health:latest && npm run release:push && npm run release:fetch && npm run release:source && npm run release:publication && npm run release:fetch && npm run release:source && npm run identity:configure && npm run release:fetch && npm run release:source && npm run deploy:firebase && npm run function-secrets:configure && npm run google:health:bound && npm run backend:smoke && npm run backend:appcheck-ci-smoke && npm run monitoring:configure && npm run production:runtime:verify
